landing.heroSubtitle2: Discover places, align preferences, create memories.
landing.noCreditCard: No credit card required • Free to start
landing.featuresSubtitle: Thoughtfully designed features that bring ease to planning
landing.feature1Desc: Intelligent recommendations based on your preferences and compatibility. Find places that resonate with you.
landing.feature2Desc: Collaborate in real-time to find the perfect venue. Share preferences and discover places you'll all enjoy.
landing.feature3Desc: From discovery to invitation in just a few taps. Track your plans and create lasting memories.
landing.howItWorksSubtitle: Getting started is quick and effortless
landing.step1Desc: Tell us what matters to you — cuisine, atmosphere, budget, and more. Our system learns your unique style to find venues that truly fit.
landing.step2Desc: Our system analyzes your preferences to find places you'll love. See insights and curated recommendations.
landing.step3Desc: Send invitations, coordinate schedules, and bring your plans to life. Create meaningful experiences and cherished memories.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Join a community that values intention and connection. Start planning experiences that matter.

onboarding.screen1Desc: Let AI find the ideal locations tailored to your preferences and mood. From cozy cafés to scenic viewpoints.
onboarding.screen2Desc: Find hidden gems and popular destinations in your neighborhood. Get personalized recommendations based on your location.
onboarding.screen3Desc: Invite friends, share experiences, and plan group dates together. Make every moment memorable with the people you love.
onboarding.goalSubtitle: We'll tailor recommendations to your goal.
onboarding.goalNetworkingDesc: New contacts in a cool location

settings.title: Account Settings
settings.name: Name
settings.changeEmailDesc: You will receive a confirmation email at the new address.
settings.confirmationSentDesc: Please confirm the change via the link in the email sent to {{email}}.
settings.changePasswordDesc: Choose a secure password with at least 6 characters.
settings.passwordChangedDesc: Your password has been updated successfully.
settings.pushActive: You receive notifications for new invitations
settings.pushInactive: Get real-time updates on your device
settings.pauseDescActive: Temporarily pause your account. Your data is preserved, but your profile becomes invisible.
settings.pauseDescPaused: Your account is paused. Your profile is invisible to others and you won't receive invitations.
settings.pausedToastDesc: Your profile is now invisible to others. You can reactivate anytime.
settings.reactivatedToastDesc: Welcome back! Your profile is active again.
settings.dataExportDesc: Download all your stored data as a JSON file (GDPR Art. 20).
settings.dataExportedDesc: Your data has been downloaded as a JSON file.
settings.dangerZoneDesc: This action cannot be undone. All your data will be permanently deleted.
settings.deleteConfirmDesc: This action permanently deletes your account and all associated data.
settings.deleteRequestedDesc: Your account will be deleted shortly. You will now be logged out.
settings.languageDesc: Choose the display language of the app.
settings.aiProfilingDesc: Information about automated processing of your data (GDPR Art. 22).
settings.aiProfilingExplanation: We use Artificial Intelligence to suggest matching date locations. For this, we analyze your preferences, past ratings, and your usage behavior (e.g., which places you favor).
settings.aiProfilingRight: You have the right to object to such automated processing at any time.
settings.aiProfilingLearnMore: Learn more in our Privacy Policy
settings.aiProfilingOnboarding: We use AI to suggest personalized date ideas. More in our

partner.step3Desc: Monitor redemptions and optimize your offers for better results

alerts.expiredActiveDesc: "{{title}}" ({{code}}) has expired but is still marked as active. Deactivate it to avoid confusion.

qr.title: Partner Network
qr.subtitle: Strengthen the community – scan partner codes for exclusive perks
qr.scanDesc: Scan another venue partner's QR code to receive an exclusive discount.
qr.shareHint: Let other partners scan your code to offer them an exclusive discount at your venue.
qr.notPartnerCode: This is not a partner code
qr.ownCode: You can't scan your own code
qr.noExclusiveDesc: Scan partner codes or let your code be scanned to share exclusive perks.
qr.discountSettingsDesc: Set the discount percentage you grant other venue partners when they scan your QR code at your venue.
qr.discountSaved: Your offered discount has been updated.
qr.alreadyScannedToday: You already scanned this partner today. Try again tomorrow.

reports.title: Reports & Invoices
reports.subtitle: Monthly billing reports and venue performance for tax purposes
reports.voucherBreakdownDesc: Detailed redemptions per voucher for this month
reports.venuePerformanceDesc: Performance metrics compared to previous month
reports.taxHintDesc: Download your monthly reports as PDF or CSV to submit to your tax advisor. All discount amounts and booking values are documented for your records.

tutorial.slide1Desc: Discover perfect date spots that match your vibe — powered by AI that learns with every date.
tutorial.slide2Desc: Pick cuisine, vibe and budget — or just check in your daily mood. The more you share, the better the suggestions.
tutorial.slide3Desc: Our AI finds venues that match your mood, taste and location — with real-time context.
tutorial.slide4Desc: Plan solo or together with your date partner. Send proposals via link — easily through WhatsApp, Telegram or email.
tutorial.slide5Desc: Rate your dates, earn points and redeem vouchers at partner venues. Your feedback makes the AI smarter!

privacyBanner.textGdpr: We do not use tracking cookies. Your data is processed in accordance with the GDPR. Our AI recommendations are based on your preferences – you can adjust this anytime in your <link>settings</link>.
privacyBanner.textCcpa: We do not sell your personal information. Under the California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA), you have the right to opt out of data sharing and request deletion of your data. <link>Privacy Policy</link>
privacyBanner.textUs: We respect your privacy. We don't use tracking cookies or sell your data. Our AI recommendations are based on your preferences – you can adjust this anytime. <link>Privacy Policy</link>
privacyBanner.textLgpd: Your data is processed in accordance with the LGPD. We do not use tracking cookies. Our AI recommendations are based on your preferences. <link>Privacy Policy</link>
privacyBanner.textOther: We respect your privacy. No tracking cookies are used. Our AI recommendations are based on your preferences – you can adjust this anytime in your settings. <link>Privacy Policy</link>
